items.shortDescription:
Upgrade your laundry experience with our 10 KG Twin Tub Washing Machine. This high-capacity appliance combines efficient cleaning with a space-saving design, making it perfect for larger households or those with frequent laundry needs. The Turbo Dry feature ensures faster drying times, while the under-side rodent protection guarantees long-lasting performance.

Standout Features:

  • 10 KG Capacity
  • Product Size: 807 MM (L) * 482 MM (W) * 980 MM (H)
  • Twin Tub Design
  • Turbo Dry Feature
  • Sleek Design
  • Under-Side Rodent Protection
  • 2-Year Warranty

items.description:
The  75″ 4K V+ Os  Smart Content TV, makes everything bigger, bolder, and more real! Its design ensures that you have an immersive viewing experience without limits or distractions.

Delve into a new reality of watching your favorite shows by elevating your sense of sight, sound, and perception. Experience life-like images from an enormous screen, the immaculate picture clarity of 4K resolution and superior Dolby surround sound that puts you in the middle of the action and makes your home as good as the cinema. Additionally, enjoy the convenience and unlimited potential of Bluetooth to connect with other devices and gives you control of your content at the palm of your hand.

  • V+ OS

  • DOES NOT SUPPORT GOOGLE PLAY STORE
